name: ts-pmo
description: TS PMO (Task Steward · Project Management Ops) — a Notion-backed project-management agent for Claude Code.

plugins.name: ts-pmo
plugins.description: TS PMO project-management skills: set-direction · create · surface-effort · plan · work-review · debrief · resync, plus ts-pmo-setup (first-run wiring) and ts-pmo-uninstall (clean removal).
